title: Volume 1 Chapter 5: Commotion
content: Chapter 5: Commotion
"Man, it sure is peaceful..."
Lately, the world had been full of peace, with no demons appearing at all.
Sigh... I'm so bored... I haven't even been able to catch a glimpse of the magical girls for a while now... At this rate, seeing any *kumorase* (despair) is nothing but a pipe dream...
There were supposed to be some pretty strong demons around this point in the anime, but they aren't showing up either. What in the world is going on?
"Are you alone again today?"
As I was pondering this, a beautiful voice that sounded like a ringing bell echoed across the area.
"...Why are you here again?"
"Of course I'm here. After all, this is my lunch spot."
She sat down next to me naturally, a relaxed smile on her face.
She's famous for hating men, so I was sure she wouldn't come back here, which is why I came today but... I misread her.
"Hey, why are you sitting next to me? This completely ruins my status as a mob. Don't steal my reason for existing."
"You're saying things that make no sense, as usual. More importantly, are you okay? Do you actually have friends? I can give you some advice if you need it."
"None of your business, I have them. Aren't you the one who's a loner, Reina?"
"I'm not like you. I simply don't need them."
"...Is that so."
Feeling that any further conversation would devolve into a pointless argument, I took a nutrition bar and a jelly drink out of my convenience store bag.
There weren't really any good bentos today, so I'm just settling for this for lunch. As long as food fills my stomach, I don't care what it is, so this is fine by me.
"...Hey, I seriously doubt it, but... please don't tell me *that* is your lunch for today."
Luna was staring intently at my lunch as if looking at something unbelievable.
"Hm? Of course it is. Is something wrong with it?"
"...Sigh... Here, eat this if you'd like."
Saying that, she handed me a bento box wrapped in a cloth adorned with cute embroidery.
Hm? Hey, hold on, hold on... Don't tell me this is...
"This is..."
[img]https://i.imgur.com/FYCgGUm.jpeg
"I accidentally made a little too much this morning. Help me consume it."
Why has this turned into a rom-com event where I get a handmade bento from the heroineeeeeee!!?
This is bad, this is very bad... If I accept this, I feel like I'll no longer be a mob...
"...No, today I'm—"
"I humbly accept!"
I yielded to Luna's pressure and ultimately decided to accept the bento.
When I untied the wrapper and opened the lid, beautifully colorful Japanese side dishes were arranged neatly inside.
"Looks delicious..."
First, I picked up a neatly rolled piece of tamagoyaki with my chopsticks and popped it into my mouth.
It was moist and soft, the thick egg perfectly intertwined with the slightly sweet flavor of the dashi broth.
It was so delicious that before I knew it, I had already eaten a second piece.
Without a doubt, this is the most delicious tamagoyaki I have ever eaten.
Next, I tried the simmered dishes, and they were also delicious.
The ingredients, thoroughly simmered and soaked in flavor, had a soft and delicate taste. It wouldn't be strange if this were served at a high-end traditional restaurant.
"How is it? Is it good?"
"...Yeah, it's delicious."
To think that someone like me... would forget he's a mob and get so absorbed in a bento...
"Fufu, I see. I'm glad to hear that. I'll bring some for you again next time."
"...Are you sure?"
"Yes. For some reason, I've been making too much lately."
Could it be... that she specifically made this just for me?
Looking closely, the contents of my bento and Luna's bento were different. Mine seemed to have a lot more thought put into its color coordination.
...No, that can't be it. Yeah, there's no way.
"...I'll gladly accept it when the time comes, then."
"Yes, you do that."
Just as she smiled in a good mood, a tremendous explosion assaulted our ears, and immediately after, I saw buildings in the city burning.
Oh! Th-This is! Could it be!!
My heart raced at the long-awaited development.
Wait, wait, calm down.
First, I need to act like a mob.
"Wh-What!? What was that explosion just now!?"
"Tch...! Even though it's been so peaceful lately...!"
Grasping the situation, she instantly broke into a run, heading toward the roof door.
"It's a demon attack! You need to hurry up and run away, too!"
Leaving those words behind, she quickly departed.
She's probably going to hide somewhere and transform.
(...Voldia.)
『Yeah, there are two demon presences with considerable power. It seems they're rampaging in the Central District... What will you do?』
(Go, obviously.)
『Kufufufu, I didn't even need to ask. As expected of the human I chose, Sōta.』
Finally, I can finally see the magical girls... The wait was so long...!
"【Majin-ka Kaihō: Dark Side】 (Demon God Liberation: Dark Side)"
As I chanted, a miasma began to drift around me, eventually converging on me.
The miasma formed into a black robe, and an eerie mask manifested over my face.
"...Shall we go."
Now then, show me some good *kumorase* this time too!
Why at a time like this...! Just when I was in such a good mood!
I sprinted through the school building with all my might.
I did wonder if it was appropriate for the Student Council President to be running at full speed down the hallways, but at a time like this, it didn't matter.
If I don't get to the scene as quickly as possible, the damage will spread and casualties will increase. I absolutely cannot let that happen.
I stepped outside and, after making sure there was no one around, chanted.
"【Magical Girl of Silver: Magical Blizzard】"
In that instant, the surrounding air turned freezing cold, and the ground frosted over.
Gradually, cold air converged onto me, transforming me into a white figure.
I had transformed into Luna of the 'Silver'.
I absolutely won't let anyone fall victim!
Floating into the air, I headed toward the scene at breakneck speed.
As expected... I can't reach his kind of speed...
The flight speed I saw from him last time clearly broke the sound barrier.
But... even so... faster... I have to go faster...
Increasing my speed further, I hurried to the scene.
Perhaps thanks to pushing myself, it wasn't long before I could see the burning buildings and the two demons who were likely the cause of all this.
"Hey, hey, hey! What's this? Human buildings sure are fragile...! They crumble like tofu!"
"Fihihi, don't say that. This is the absolute limit for humans."
Those guys...!
I channeled magic power into my hands, generating a freezing aura.
"I'll blow everything away with this!"
"I won't let you!"
I layered my freezing aura over the explosive blast the demon had fired toward the city.
The air around us warped from the clash between the intense heat of the blast and my freezing cold.
After competing for a few seconds, both spells lost their efficacy and vanished.
"That's enough, demons."
"...Oho... So you've finally made an appearance, Miss Magical Girl!"
"Watch out, Prozion. Magical girls are tough."
This is bad... They have the advantage in numbers... and based on their strength, they're both at my level or possibly higher...
Just then, out of the corner of my eye, I saw four silhouettes heading this way.
"...Fufu, that's right... I'm not alone!"
"Sorry to keep you waiting! Luna!"
"As expected of Luna, fast as always."
"Naturally, we'll fight together too."
"Providing backup~"
All five magical girls had gathered.
That's right, the five of us are one.
If it's the five of us, we can win...!
"They just keep coming... The odds are a bit against us. Should we retreat for now?"
"Don't be an idiot, Janieja! You take two, and I'll take three."
It seems our opponents are completely looking down on us... It pisses me off, but it means they're that confident in their skills...
"Fran, Fiona, and I will take on this demon. You two handle the other one."
"Leave it to us. We'll finish it quickly and come back you up..."
"Be careful, you three...!"
We split from the other two and faced the demon called Prozion.
This demon... is stronger than the tentacle demon we fought before... Stronger than the demon that nearly wiped us out...
My body trembled slightly at that fact.
I can't afford to think about unnecessary things... Right now, I just have to focus on the fight...!
"Now then, magical girls... Entertain me, will you?"
Right after saying that, the demon swept his right arm horizontally.
"This is...!"
"Both of you, fly upwards!"
Reacting immediately to my words, the two flew up, and the exact spot we were standing on just a moment ago exploded violently.
"That was close... If it wasn't for Luna, we would've taken that head-on..."
"High-temperature explosions... a troublesome ability..."
"Listen, both of you. He can't trigger his explosions remotely. He definitely uses a part of his body to cause the explosion, and that part glows red right before he activates his power!"
"Hoh... That's some pretty good analysis. I'll praise you for that. Well, whether you can actually make use of it is a different story!"
Prozion swung his arms again.
This time, both hands simultaneously, and with greater power and speed than before.
"We can't dodge this...!"
I used the same method as before, unleashing my freezing aura at full power towards the explosions.
"The heat is higher than before... I need more cold air...!"
I continued to cool the ever-intensifying explosions with even lower-temperature freezing air.
"Any more than this is...!"
"...I'll back you up."
When Fran threw something she had produced with her Creation ability into the blast, the temperature plummeted dramatically.
Amazing, Fran! You created an extinguishing agent and threw it in...! With this, we can do it!
Pouring in even more freezing aura, the blast eventually subsided, leaving thick black smoke billowing around us.
"Haa... haa... Are you two okay?"
"...That freezing ability of yours is seriously a pain in the ass... I'll blow you to bits first!"
Generating a blast at his feet, Prozion shot towards me with tremendous propulsion in the next instant.
No... I can't do anything...
"Luna! Look out!"
Just as Prozion's hand was about to touch me, Fiona stepped in between us.
Immediately after, bathed in skin-scorching heat and a powerful blast, Fiona and I were blown away, crashing into a high-rise building before plummeting to the ground.
"Fiona...! Hang in there!"
"Thank... goodness... You're safe... Luna..."
"Why would you protect someone like me! You're the one who's..."
"Lu, na... You're the only one... who can beat him... Please... win..."
With those final words, the strength left Fiona's body.
Why... Why am I always... Why...!
"How incredibly weak... Is this all magical girls amount to?"
Prozion said with a smug expression while choking a severely burned Fran.
No way... It can't be... Even Fran...!
"Prozion, you still aren't finished?"
The other demon, Janieja, was looking at our state with a bored expression.
...No way... Even those two...
"Sorry about that, it took a little extra effort."
"Well, whatever. Hurry up and finish them off."
"Yeah, I'm on it."
Prozion pointed his palm at me.
"Heh, with this, the magical girls are completely wiped out. All by the hands of the great Prozion... I'll be able to give *Him* a good report."
This time, it really is... the end...
That previous time really was a miracle... Miracles don't happen twice.
Because reality is just this cruel.
I... did my best, didn't I...?
"Die."
Prozion's palm glowed red.
This time, it's really the end.
Just as I braced myself for that, a voice echoed from somewhere.
"You are not finished yet."
Immediately after, an impact like a crashing meteorite spread out right in front of my eyes.
"Wh-What!?"
Despite it being a tremendous impact, for some reason, not a single piece of rubble flew towards me. It was as if an invisible wall was protecting me.
Slowly opening my eyes, which I had squeezed shut from the impact, I saw the back of a man clad in a black robe standing right before me.
Just seeing that black robe made large teardrops overflow from my eyes.
...You really... came...
"My name is Omega... The one who peers into the abyss of gloom."
There he was, Omega, standing as if to protect me.
High up in the sky.
From up there, I had been intently watching the battle between the magical girls and the demons.
『What is it, Sōta? Are you not going to intervene?』
"Wait, I'm right in the middle of thoroughly enjoying this..."
『Hm? Ah, I see... Kufufu, you truly are an amusing one...』
The magical girls were fighting against two powerful demons.
And now, that battle had finally reached its conclusion.
The result was a crushing defeat for the magical girls.
The last one remaining, Luna, was looking at her comrades falling powerlessly to the ground with an expression like the world was ending.

Ah, this is great... The usually calm and cool Luna showing an expression of pure despair at the overwhelming difference in strength between them and the demons, the light fading from her eyes as she watches her injured comrades unable to stand back up... Man... Magical girls really are the absolute best!
To think I could see a magical girl's *kumorase* this closely... I'm so glad I came to this world. I don't know if it was a god or whatever that reincarnated me, but thank you so much.
While I was basking in the afterglow for a while, I saw the demon about to deal the finishing blow to the magical girl.
"...Alright then."
Demon-kun, your job is done.
『Are you finished?』
"Yeah, I'm intervening."
『Kufufu, I have been waiting.』
I dropped toward the ground at breakneck speed.
And landed forcefully right between the two of them.
"My name is Omega... The one who peers into the abyss of gloom."
Landing between Luna and the demon, I spoke in a voice that seemed to echo from the depths of hell.
"I knew it... you really... came...! You are my..."
I felt like Luna was muttering something like that behind me, but I turned to face the demon.
"Omega? Who the hell are you?"
The demon asked, looking puzzled.
"There is no need for you to know, because you are about to perish."
"...You sure got a smart mouth on you. Do you honestly think you can defeat us two titled demons: me, Janieja of the 'Gale', and Prozion of the 'Explosion'?"
Titled demons, huh... Come to think of it, those were a thing.
I remember seeing titled demons in the anime. Even among demons, they are the ones who possess powerful and atrocious abilities.
『Hoh... Titled ones... They sound rather strong, do they not.』
(Yeah, kinda.)
『Indeed. But it will pose absolutely no problem whatsoever.』
Voldia answered with supreme confidence.
Well, then I guess we'll manage.
"Do you truly think I cannot?"
"Tch! You'll only be acting tough for so long!"
"I'll kill you!"
The two of them attacked me simultaneously, Prozion's explosive blast and Janieja's gale-force thrust closing in on me.
Alright then, let's have a little combat test.
(Voldia.)
『I know.』
I take Janieja's thrust.
Voldia takes Prozion's blast.
We each block one.
As I effortlessly stopped Janieja's gale-force thrust with just my index and middle fingers, clear agitation surfaced on Janieja's face.
"Wh-Why!? You bastard, how are you able to do that!"
"Who knows. Perhaps because I am stronger than you?"
"Don't play dumb... Why is it that, while focusing entirely on me, you are simultaneously blocking Prozion's attack and even counterattacking!"
Looking over, I saw that Prozion, who was supposed to have fired a blast at me, had his arm blown off and was wearing an expression of pure agony.
『Just defending was boring, so I threw in a counterattack while I was at it☆』
(As expected of Voldia, pulling off things I can't do like it's nothing. I admire that.)
『Hmph, naturally. Anyway, let's move on to the next.』
(Yeah.)
As we were having our little strategy meeting, Janieja, fearing he would receive a counterattack like Prozion, retreated and put a large distance between us.
"Damn it! My arm! You bastard...!"
"Prozion, just regenerate that thing already!"
"—Now then, it is my turn next, is it not?"
Both of their faces were dyed in despair.
No, I seriously don't need despair from you guys. Who would even want to see that.
"First, the explosive one. I will start with you."
"D-Damn youuuu!!"
In desperation, Prozion fired hundreds of blasts per second from both hands straight at me.
I defended against all of them and gradually closed the distance.
"Damn it! If it's come to this...!"
He stopped the bombardment and, conversely, started sprinting towards me.
"I'll turn this whole city to cinders with my maximum firepower—"
A suicidal attack, fully prepared to blow himself up, huh.
I see, he thought that through... However...
"【Despair Eye】"
"It is meaningless against me."
"What..."
In that instant, Prozion's legs collapsed.
No, not just his legs.
Fissures propagated throughout his entire body.
"Wha... Gah! Gaaah—"
Then the cracks shattered, and his entire body disintegrated.
"You are next, you know?"
"Ghk! You monster!"
Perhaps deciding he couldn't beat me, Janieja flew high into the sky with the speed of a gale.
"I have to get as far away from that monster as—"
"—You are too slow."
"What! Since when—"
Catching up to him in an instant, I slammed a devastating kick into him, sending him plummeting to the ground.
A massive crater had formed at the spot where Janieja fell.
(Voldia, I'll leave the rest to you.)
『Yeah, leave it to me.』
Right after, countless jet-black magic circles floated up behind me.
『【Ruin Bullet】』
The moment Voldia chanted that, the magic circles flared, and jet-black energy bullets were discharged, raining down into the crater where Janieja lay.
Shot after shot after shot, the jet-black bullets gouged out the ground over a wide area.
By the time the barrage ceased, Janieja was nowhere to be seen; only a massive, gaping hole remained.
Descending to the ground, I checked the condition of the magical girls' injuries and began healing them.
Fiona had been critically injured, but after I applied the treatment, she was restored to perfect condition.
This is actually pretty amazing... I might even be able to resurrect them if they die—
A wicked thought briefly crossed my mind, but my love for magical girls wouldn't allow it.
That's right, even before I love seeing their despair, I love the magical girls themselves. I will absolutely not permit the magical girls to meet a dead end.
After finishing treating all the magical girls, just as I was about to leave, I felt someone grab the edge of my robe. Turning around, I saw Luna with a gentle smile on her face.
"Omega..."
"...What is it?"
"Thank... you..."
The moment she conveyed her gratitude, she lost consciousness.
"...It is only natural. To me, magical girls are my reason for living."
